desc_lines: 100% Devil/Angel Room chance
collectibles.desc_raw: {{AngelDevilChance}} 100% Devil/Angel Room chance
synergies: Black Feather: Grants a damage boost.
Duality: Both Angel and Devil Room doors spawn after every boss, and the selected door will never disappear.

collectibles.name: Ceremonial Robes
desc_lines: ↑ +1 Damage
+3 Black Hearts
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Damage}} +1 Damage#{{BlackHeart}} +3 Black Hearts
synergies: Black Feather: Ceremonial Robes counts as an 'evil' item, granting a damage boost.

collectibles.name: Mom's Wig
desc_lines: Heals 1 heart
5% chance to spawn a blue spider when shooting tears
100% chance at 10 luck
collectibles.desc_raw: {{HealingRed}} Heals 1 heart#5% chance to spawn a blue spider when shooting tears#{{Luck}} 100% chance at 10 luck
synergies: na+ Brimstone / Chocolate Milk / Cursed Eye / Mom's Knife / Monstro's Lung / Tech X: Charging an attack spawns spiders in rapid succession.
Epic Fetus / The Ludovico Technique / Marked: Moving the tear/crosshair around will spawn spiders rapidly.
Fish Tail: Doubles the total amount of spiders that can be spawned at the same time, up to a total of 10.
Hive Mind: Doubles the limit to 10 spiders, in addition to boosting the damage of spiders per the item's base effect.

collectibles.name: Placenta
desc_lines: ↑ +1 Health
Heals 1 heart
50% chance to heal half a heart every minute
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Heart}} +1 Health#{{HealingRed}} Heals 1 heart#{{HealingRed}} 50% chance to heal half a heart every minute
synergies: Blood Oath: With enough patience, health can be safely restored each floor by waiting in the starting room.
Gnawed Leaf: Regeneration works while turned to stone, allowing Isaac to become invincible and regenerate while in any room.
Sanguine Bond: Can be used indefinitely with placenta’s regen. Also works with normal sacrifice rooms.
Sharp Plug: With enough patience, any active item can be reused indefinitely.
Habit: Like Sharp Plug, any active item can be reused indefinitely with enough patience.
IV Bag, Piggy Bank, Fanny Pack, Swallowed Penny, Gimpy, Old Bandage: Can produce infinite of their respective consumables if given enough time
Blood Donation Machine,Devil Beggar & Hell Game: If given enough time will always reach their item payout.
Razor Blade: Can be used to stack damage before triggering boss fights that do not automatically trigger upon room entry such as Hush, Mega Satan, or Dogma
Cracked Dice: Can be used to re-roll items many times in a room if a damage source is present or the player has enough bombs.

collectibles.name: Old Bandage
desc_lines: ↑ +1 Empty heart container
Taking damage has a 20% chance to spawn a Red Heart
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{EmptyHeart}} +1 Empty heart container#{{Heart}} Taking damage has a 20% chance to spawn a Red Heart
synergies: Blood Oath: For each half heart damaged by Blood Oath, Old Bandage has a chance to drop a heart. Synergy further improves with luck.
IV Bag + Humbleing Bundle / Maggy's Bow: The damage from IV Bag has a chance to spawn 2 hearts, which can be picked up to create further coins and possibly even heal hearts with enough Luck.
r Humbleing Bundle only has a 50% chance to double the hearts dropped, but Old Bandage may still drop 1 heart.

collectibles.name: Sad Bombs
desc_lines: +5 Bombs
Isaac's bombs shoot 10 tears in a circle when they explode
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Bomb}} +5 Bombs#Isaac's bombs shoot 10 tears in a circle when they explode
synergies: Anti-Gravity: Tears will hover in place for a few seconds before dispersing.
BBF/Best Friend/Bob's Brain/Bob's Rotten Head/Mr. Boom: Gains the Sad Bombs effect.
Blood Bombs: Gives the bombs a unique visual appearance (red tears), and changes the color of the tears shot to red.
Blood Clot: The bombs produce tears that mimic the tear last fired before explosion.
Bomber Boy: Each explosion releases 10 tears in all directions.
a Brimstone: Bombs explode into Brimstone beams in all directions.
Compound Fracture/Cricket's Body/The Parasite: Bombs explode into tears that will split.
anr Dr. Fetus/ Epic Fetus: Fired bombs/missiles will explode into tears.
r Fired bombs/missiles have a chance to explode into tears. This chance scales with luck, going up to 100% at 30 luck.
Guppy: The bomb’s tears can also generate flies.
Haemolacria: Bombs explode into Haemolacria tears which burst into tears.
Kamikaze!: Tears will explode after activating the item.
Mom's Knife: Bombs explode into knives that don't return.
Multidimensional Baby: Each tear from the bomb will be duplicated.
a+Red Locusts: A ring of 10 tears is shot outward upon detonation, which are affected by Isaac's tear modifiers, and deal damage equal to 15 + 0.6x, where x is Isaac's Damage.
Scatter Bombs: All mini bombs gain the effect and deal full damage.
rTears from extra explosions deal 65% of their normal damage.
Technology: Bombs explode into Technology beams in all directions.
Tech X: Bombs explode into Technology beams in all directions.

collectibles.name: Rubber Cement
desc_lines: Isaac's tears bounce off enemies and obstacles
collectibles.desc_raw: Isaac's tears bounce off enemies and obstacles
synergies: a Brimstone: The blood laser bounces off of walls, creating a second beam that deals half damage.
a Azazel's Brimstone laser becomes a full length laser after bouncing, but will deal half of the damage.
a+ Azazel's Brimstone no longer becomes a full length laser after bouncing, and instead bounce as a regular mini-Brimstone.
A Lump of Coal: Both effects stack, with tears that bounce off of enemies being able to hit others for more damage.
The Parasite: Tears will bounce off of walls without splitting, but split and bounce when hitting enemies. The split tears and the original one will bounce off everything.

Pop!: Significantly increases the uptime of tears, since they are not limited by range and each tear will bounce off of each other. Continuously firing tears will eventually create a positive feedback loop, as the tears will keep bouncing faster and faster while not dropping to the floor.

Pop! + A Lump of Coal: Extremely powerful combination; Lump of Coal's tear size increase will make it much easier for tears to bounce off of each other, while they increase in damage very rapidly. Given some time and enough tears, this can kill even final bosses such as Hush and Delirium quickly.
a Technology / Technology 2 / Tech.5: Laser bounces off walls, creating a second beam that does half damage.
Tech X: The laser rings bounce off walls.

collectibles.name: Anti-Gravity
desc_lines: ↑ +1 Fire rate
Holding the fire buttons causes tears to hover in mid-air
Releasing the fire buttons shoots them in the direction they were fired
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Tears}} +1 Fire rate#Holding the fire buttons causes tears to hover in mid-air#Releasing the fire buttons shoots them in the direction they were fired
synergies: C Section: Fetuses stand in place while the fire button is held. They will still home on enemies in this state. Fetuses attacking this way deal more damage.
The Forgotten: Each swing of his club creates an additional hitbox in front of him that lasts for about a second before proceeding forward and disappearing. The club throw is unaffected.
Lachryphagy: Tears will float in midair, making them easier to feed. Burst tears will also float in midair before moving.
Proptosis: The tears will not decrease in size or damage until they start moving, making this excellent against enemies that chase Isaac.
Tainted Magdalene: Hug swipes float, allowing for extra hits as the swipes remain mid-air.
Tech.5: Creates floating laser balls that will all fire simultaneously when the fire button is released.
Technology Zero: All of the tears fired are connected by electricity, creating a series of electric fences.
Tiny Planet: Tears stay in place until released, they will start to orbit around Isaac when released.
r Tears orbit close to Isaac when held, then snap to the edge of the orbit when released.

collectibles.name: Pyromaniac
desc_lines: +5 Bombs
Immunity to explosions and fire
Getting hit by explosions heals half a heart
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Bomb}} +5 Bombs#Immunity to explosions and fire#{{HealingRed}} Getting hit by explosions heals half a heart
synergies: Anarchist Cookbook: Spawned bombs can be used for mass healing.

Blood Bombs: If the player has run out of bombs, they can spend half a heart to drop a bomb and recover it by getting caught in the explosion (it won't work on characters that can't obtain red health).
This allows Isaac to infinitely damage himself for items such as Fanny Pack.
Bomber Boy: Heals Isaac multiple times per bomb depending on the number of explosions that hit him.
Curse of the Tower: Whenever Isaac gets hit, numerous healing troll bombs fill the room, nullifying nearly any red heart damage taken.
Dr. Fetus / Epic Fetus / Ipecac: Explosions heal Isaac, essentially making him invincible as long as he has more than one red heart container and a decent rate of fire.
Kamikaze!: Provides an unlimited source of explosions which will heal.
Tainted Magdalene: Explosions heal a full Red Heart again.
Walnut: Walnut will only require 1-5 explosions to open. As Isaac is immune to explosions, he can safely open Walnut without taking any damage.

collectibles.name: Cricket's Body
desc_lines: ↑ +0.5 Fire rate
↓ x0.8 Range multiplier
Tears split in 4 on hit
Split tears deal half damage
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Tears}} +0.5 Fire rate#↓ {{Range}} x0.8 Range multiplier#Tears split in 4 on hit#Split tears deal half damage
synergies: Angelic Prism: All tears split by the prism will burst into split tears.
Bob's Rotten Head: Bob's Rotten Head splits into four smaller heads on detonation.
Compound Fracture: When bone tears split into bone shards after hitting an obstacle or enemy, the bone shards will split into 4 smaller bone shards after hitting the ground.

Explosivo: The explosion results in split Explosivo shots being generated. nr If the target survives, they're likely to immediately stick again. r The split tears explode when they hit an enemy or the ground.
Haemolacria: Main tears can split as they burst upon hitting the floor, an obstacle, or an enemy. The split tears can burst, but burst tears from main tears do not split.
Cricket's Body's x0.8 range multiplier does not stack with Haemolacria's own x0.8 range multiplier.
Ipecac: Main tear splits into four explosive splash tears. The split tears can still damage Isaac. Having Host Hat or Pyromaniac is strongly recommended.
r Cricket's Body's x0.8 range multiplier does not stack with Ipecac's own x0.8 range multiplier.
Lachryphagy: Fed tears split into 12 tears.
Lead Pencil/Monstro's Lung: All tears fired will splash after landing. Increased damage potential only noticed when firing into groups, due to the random pattern of each tear when it splashes.
The Parasite: Eight split tears instead of four.
Tiny Planet: The split tears orbit Isaac instead of spreading.
Tough Love: Teeth tears will split into 4 smaller teeth.
Tractor Beam: Main tears and split tears will travel along the beam.

collectibles.name: Gimpy
desc_lines: Taking damage has a 8% chance to spawn a Soul Heart
+2% chance per luck
Enemies have a chance to drop a half Red Heart on death
collectibles.desc_raw: {{SoulHeart}} Taking damage has a 8% chance to spawn a Soul Heart#{{Luck}} +2% chance per luck#{{HalfHeart}} Enemies have a chance to drop a half Red Heart on death
synergies: Blood Oath: For each half heart damaged by Blood Oath, Gimpy has a chance to drop a soul heart. Synergy further improves with luck.

Dark Bum: Dark Bum can collect the Half Red Hearts that enemies drop, which when combined with the chance to drop Soul Hearts when damaged, is a good way to generate Soul and Black Hearts as well as other pickups.

collectibles.name: Black Lotus
desc_lines: ↑ +1 Health
Heals 1 heart
+1 Soul Heart
+1 Black Heart
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Heart}} +1 Health#{{HealingRed}} Heals 1 heart#{{SoulHeart}} +1 Soul Heart#{{BlackHeart}} +1 Black Heart

collectibles.name: Piggy Bank
desc_lines: +3 Coins
Taking damage spawns 1-2 coins
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Coin}} +3 Coins#{{Coin}} Taking damage spawns 1-2 coins

collectibles.name: Mom's Perfume
desc_lines: ↑ +0.5 Fire rate (Flat bonus, ignores tears cap)
15% chance to shoot fear tears
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Tears}} +0.5 Fire rate (Flat bonus, ignores tears cap)#{{Fear}} 15% chance to shoot fear tears
synergies: Compound Fracture / Cricket's Body / Haemolacria / The Parasite: If the main tear causes fear, the split tears cause fear too.
Finger!: Finger can also apply the fear effect.
Lachryphagy: If a fear tear is fed, all burst tears cause fear. If a normal tear is fed, the burst tears cannot cause fear.
The Ludovico Technique: The tear flickers yellow, capable of inflicting fear when it does.

collectibles.name: Monstro's Lung
desc_lines: ↓ x0.23 Fire rate multiplier
Tears are charged and released in a shotgun style attack
collectibles.desc_raw: ↓ {{Tears}} x0.23 Fire rate multiplier#{{Chargeable}} Tears are charged and released in a shotgun style attack
synergies: 20/20 / The Inner Eye / Mutant Spider
nr Adds 2, 5 or 7 tears to the barrage respectively. For the latter two, greatly slows down the charge.
r Adds 2.4 extra tears to the barrage per extra tear added by the item, rounded down to the nearest whole number. For the latter two, greatly slows down the charge.
Almond Milk / Soy Milk: Fires automatically upon reaching full charge, regardless of fire rate.
Anti-Gravity: Hover effect is overidden, but tear delay down still applies, which greatly reduces the charge time.
Blood Clot: All tears are larger, with increased damage (as opposed to every 2nd tear like Blood Clot alone).
a+ Tears have a 50% chance to be Blood Clot tears.

Brimstone: Brimstone has priority. Does not apply Monstro's Lung's tears down. Fires 3-5 additional beams in random directions around Isaac. This effect also applies to Azazel and Tainted Azazel's versions of Brimstone.
Brimstone + Eye Sore: Overrides this synergy with a chance to shoot 1-3 additional beams in random directions.
Chocolate Milk: Reduces Isaac's tear delay by 20%, and each tear from Monstro's Lung is a charged Chocolate Milk shot, massively increasing fire rate and damage.
This does not apply to Lilith's Incubus; picking up Chocolate Milk will significantly reduce damage and increase charge time.
r The tear damage and the barrage size scale with charge amount. At 50% charge, the tear damage is 100%, the barrage size reaches 100% and is capped there. At 100% charge, the tear damage is 200%.
\text{Charge Time (s)} = \frac{1}{30}(Roundup(\text{Tear Delay} \times \frac{5}{2} + 1)) \approx \frac{5}{2 \times \text{Fire Rate}}
This makes damage per second drop to 80%.
Dr. Fetus: Monstro's Lung has priority. Does not apply Dr. Fetus' tears down. Fires 6 bombs which detonate simultaneously.
r Monstro's Lung has priority. Does not apply Dr. Fetus' tears down. Fires 6 mini-bombs which detonate at different times. Multi-shot effects add 1 bomb to the barrage, up to 21 bombs.
Epic Fetus: Epic Fetus has priority. Does not apply Monstro's Lung's tears down. 2-4 extra cursors rotate around the main cursor before the missiles land.
Eye Sore: Adds a chance to fire 1-3 additional barrages in random directions.

The Forgotten: Melee swing is unaffected, but the throw attack is replaced by the burst attack with small bones instead of tears. Each additional copy of Monstro's lung adds 5 bone clubs in his melee attack, up to a limit of 16. The Soul behaves normally, including the tears down.
Flat Stone: All tears bounce simultaneously; the effective range is greatly increased.

Haemolacria: Monstro's Lung has priority. Applies +43 Tear Delay after Haemolacria tears down, instead of Monstro's Lung tears down. The barrage size is reduced to 4/7 (roughly 0.57), tears of which all burst.
The barrage size is 8 without any multi-shot effect. The resulting amount is rounded, and is capped at 29.
Immaculate Heart: Fires a large number of extra tears alongside the burst that begin orbiting Isaac once they reach the orbit range.
Ipecac: Fires Ipecac tears, with no increase in charge time.
r Applies Ipecac's tears down.

collectibles.name: Abaddon
desc_lines: ↑ +0.2 Speed
↑ +1.5 Damage
Converts all heart containers into Black Hearts
+2 Black Hearts
15% chance to shoot fear tears
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Speed}} +0.2 Speed#↑ {{Damage}} +1.5 Damage#{{BlackHeart}} Converts all heart containers into Black Hearts#{{BlackHeart}} +2 Black Hearts#{{Fear}} 15% chance to shoot fear tears
synergies: Black Feather: Grants a damage boost.

collectibles.name: Ball of Tar
desc_lines: 10% chance to shoot slowing tears
100% chance at 18 luck
Isaac leaves a trail of slowing creep
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Slow}} 10% chance to shoot slowing tears#{{Luck}} 100% chance at 18 luck#{{Slow}} Isaac leaves a trail of slowing creep

collectibles.name: Stop Watch
desc_lines: ↑ +0.3 Speed
Enemies are permanently slowed down to 80% of their attack and movement speed
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Speed}} +0.3 Speed#{{Slow}} Enemies are permanently slowed down to 80% of their attack and movement speed
collectibles.unlock: Donate 999 Coins to the Donation Machine
synergies: anr Holy Mantle: Blocking damage with Holy Mantle triggers the Stop Watch effect.
r All Slow effects: Stacks with the status resulting in enemies moving at about 41% of their original speed.

collectibles.name: Tiny Planet
desc_lines: ↑ +6.5 Range
Spectral tears
Isaac's tears orbit around him
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Range}} +6.5 Range#Spectral tears#Isaac's tears orbit around him
synergies: 20/20: Each shot fires two tears in opposing orbital directions.
This synergy is effectively the same for The Wiz, with the exception of 20/20's damage penalty not being applied.
Anti-Gravity: Tears orbit around Isaac at a short range while fire button is held. When the fire button is released, tears snap to their normal range.
Azazel: Increases Azazel's range with Brimstone, and wraps the beam around the character.
Brain Worm: Tears will home directly towards nearby enemies in a line from the center of the orbit.
Brimstone: The beam will wrap around the character and shoot straight forward.
Brimstone + Mom's Knife: The knives shot after the Brimstone beam similarly wrap around the character and shoot forward.
Cricket's Body: Tears will split into 2 close groups of 2 tears that follow the orbit. One group travels clockwise and the other travels counterclockwise.
Euthanasia: Euthanasia's tear bursts will follow the orbit in 2 close groups of 5 tears. One group travels clockwise and the other travels counterclockwise.
Eye of Belial: After piercing an enemy, instead of homing in on enemies, tears will continue to orbit, but each tear can pierce multiple enemies to gain more size and damage multipliers.
Eye of the Occult: Tears struggle to move outside of the pre-set path Tiny Planet gives.
Flat Stone: Tears will bounce and orbit around the character.
Godhead: Tears with damaging auras orbit the character, creating a damaging barrier.
Ipecac: Explosive tears orbit around Isaac. Host Hat or Pyromaniac is highly recommended.
Kidney Stone: The stone and barrage of tears that follow orbit the character.

Lachryphagy: nr Tears will orbit until they are behind the character. Tears will burst into 8 tears that follow the orbit in 2 close groups of 4. One group travels clockwise and the other travels counterclockwise.
r Tears orbit the player without slowing down, and can be fed as normal. When a tear bursts, the created tears orbit the place of burst.
Loki's Horns: Effectively grants a great tear multiplier, as the extra tears from Loki's Horns will follow the trajectory given by the Tiny Planet.
Lost Contact: Shielded tears will orbit Isaac, granting a partially successful 360-degree projectile protection around him. Works better with a faster fire rate or Anti-Gravity.
A Lump of Coal: This item drastically increases the screen time of tears because it makes them orbit around Isaac for a few seconds. A Lump Of Coal adds a lot of damage to tears in "outer orbit".
the tears do not fall during the beast fight allowing tears to grow bigger and bigger
Marked: Isaac will continuously fire orbiting tears, which allows him to not touch the attack keys and focus just on moving (with giant tears it makes it hard to see as he can't stop firing).
rMom's Knife: Increases range. Causes Mom's knife to orbit around Isaac at very high speeds until it reaching it's maximum range, where it will circle back to Isaac at the same speed.
rMy Reflection: After reaching their maximum range, the tears will circle back around to Isaac.
Revelation: The beam of light wraps around Isaac and shoots forward at a slight angle, similar to Brimstone.

collectibles.name: Infestation 2
desc_lines: Killing an enemy spawns a blue spider
collectibles.desc_raw: Killing an enemy spawns a blue spider

collectibles.name: E. Coli
desc_lines: Touching an enemy turns it into poop
collectibles.desc_raw: Touching an enemy turns it into poop
synergies: Brown Cap : The generated poops explode when destroyed.
Butt Penny / Petrified Poop: Grants poops made from enemies a chance to drop pickups.
Death's List: Enemies that die by being turned into poop do not disrupt the Death's List chain and clearing a room by turning all its enemies into poop still grants Isaac the Death's List reward.
Dirty Mind: Enemies that are turned into poop generate double the normal amount of Dips.
Holy Mantle / Isaac's Heart / Invulnerability : The effect can be applied without taking contact damage.

Lodestone: If an enemy is hit by a lodestone tear perfectly simultaneously with it being turned into poop, the resulting poop will be tinted black and have a lodestone aura that sucks in enemies. This poop will return to normal after a few seconds.
Midas' Touch: Enemies touched are turned into Golden Poop.
Oh Crap: Isaac can heal by destroying poops created from enemies.
Tainted Forgotten: The body will turn enemies into poop on contact.

desc_lines: ↑ +1.5 Damage
↑ x2 Tear size
↓ -0.3 Tears
Piercing tears
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Damage}} +1.5 Damage#↑ {{Tearsize}} x2 Tear size#↓ {{Tears}} -0.3 Tears#Piercing tears

collectibles.name: Key Piece 1
desc_lines: Getting both parts of the key opens a big golden door

Options?: Spawns a second set of consumables. The "Options?" consumable is not guaranteed to be the same for each copy of the original consumable.

collectibles.name: Tech.5
desc_lines: Occasionally shoot lasers in addition to Isaac's tears

collectibles.desc_raw: Occasionally shoot lasers in addition to Isaac's tears#Small chance for lasers to have random effects

desc_lines: ↓ x0.8 Damage multiplier
Isaac shoots 2 tears at once
collectibles.desc_raw: ↓ {{Damage}} x0.8 Damage multiplier#Isaac shoots 2 tears at once
synergies: Blood Clot / Chemical Peel: Every second row of tears has increased damage.
aBrimstone: Two Brimstone shots are fired, without an increase in charge time.
Diplopia: Every additional 20/20 adds 2 more tears in a tight pattern.
r Adds one more tear without further lowering damage.
aDoctor's Remote / Epic Fetus: Replaces the single missile strike with a barrage of two consecutive missiles.
anrThe Inner Eye / Mutant Spider: Adds two/three tears to each shot, with no extra fire rate decrease.
r Removes the fire rate penalty while reducing damage to 80%. Additional copies will add one additional tear with no further change to damage/fire rate.
Keeper: Fires 5 tears with no fire rate decrease.

r Decreases tears' spread. Reduces damage dealt to 80%, but makes his base tear stat equal 2.73. This is a damage per second increase if tear rate before picking up was less than 3.75; otherwise this is a damage per second decrease. This is the same for Tainted Keeper.
The Ludovico Technique: The Ludovico tear gains one smaller tear orbiting the main one, each dealing the same amount of damage.
aMonstro's Lung: Adds two tears to the tear barrage, for a total of 16.
rPolyphemus: Grants additional +5 flat damage and removes the fire rate penalty, firing 2 tears per shot.
Sprinkler: Fires two tears at once that almost completely overlap each other.
aTechnology: Fires two technology shots simultaneously.
Tractor Beam: Both tears are fired along the beam. Only one tear can be seen, as they overlap each other.
The Wiz: Two tears are fired in each direction.

collectibles.name: BFFS!
desc_lines: Familiars deal double damage
collectibles.desc_raw: Familiars deal double damage
synergies: BBF/Bob's Brain: Doubles impact damage and increases explosive damage by 25.

rHoly Water: Double water damage and spawns a blue flame at point of impact.
Incubus: Shoots tears that do nr 2x Isaac's damage / r 1.5x Isaac's damage. Still deals 2x as Lilith.
rIsaac's Heart: Fires additional shots in random directions and leaves a larger puddle of creep. Does not change the heart's size.
Juicy Sack: Spawns an extra Blue Spider.
Lil Spewer: Increases the creep pool's size, but not its damage.
Lost Soul: Gives the Lost Soul a Holy Mantle effect.
Mystery Egg: Spawns a champion variant of an enemy, even if the enemy normally can't be a champion.
Stitches: On use, fires eight tears from Isaac's original location. The tears synergize with Isaac's tear effects.
Succubus: The aura's radius increases, but the damage multiplier and damage to enemies remain the same.

collectibles.name: Hive Mind
desc_lines: Blue spiders and flies deal double damage
Spider and fly familiars become stronger

synergies: Guppy: Doubles the damage of all Blue Flies spawned greatly increasing damage output.

Crooked Penny / Diplopia: Both items are copied, allowing Isaac to take both copied items without the other disappearing. The original pedestals will function as normal, removing the other if one is collected.
IV - The Emperor?: The extra boss room's rewards will be two choice pedestals.
Jacob and Esau: Both brothers can take one item each if they are lined up properly.
Satanic Bible: Both items will be Devil Room items; only one can be bought.
Vanishing Twin: The item which appears after defeating the copied boss is also affected.

↑ +2.75 Range for the left eye

synergies: Almond Milk/Soy Milk: The damage of Blood Clot is unaffected by the damage multiplier, significantly increasing DPS.
Dr. Fetus: Turns all bombs red and increases their damage.
Epic Fetus: Missiles have a high chance to deal 20 points more damage with a red explosion.
Lead Pencil: The tears in the Lead Pencil barrage will always have the Blood Clot effect.
Monstro's Lung: Effect is applied every time you shoot.

Saturnus: Orbiting tears will be the same as the last fired tear before leaving the previous room. To guarantee orbiting tears with the Blood Clot damage bonus, your last fired tear before leaving a room must come from the left eye.
Technology 2: As the laser from Technology 2 occupies your right eye, all tears now fired from the left eye have the statistical benefit of Blood Clot applied.

The Wiz: Blood Clot applies on both eyes, meaning the second shot from either eye will always be a Blood Clot shot. It will randomly alternate which shot of the two eyes counts for the other's Blood Clot shot if you fire multiple tears per shot like with Cursed Eye.

desc_lines: ↑ +0.5 Tears
↑ +0.2 Shot speed

desc_lines: +5 Bombs
Isaac's bombs deal contact damage
Isaac's bombs leave a flame where they explode
Fire immunity (except projectiles)
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Bomb}} +5 Bombs#{{Burning}} Isaac's bombs deal contact damage#{{Burning}} Isaac's bombs leave a flame where they explode#{{Burning}} Fire immunity (except projectiles)
synergies: BBF / Best Friend / Bob's Brain / Bob's Rotten Head / Mr. Boom: These explosions are affected by Hot Bombs.
Bomber Boy: Bombs leave behind nine fires in a cross shaped pattern.
aDoctor's Remote / Dr. Fetus / Epic Fetus: Bombs/missiles are affected by Hot Bombs.
a+Red Locusts: Red locust explosions are affected.
Remote Detonator: Allows for maximization of contact damage, especially if an enemy gets stuck on a bomb.
anr Scatter Bombs: Each additional explosion creates a fire.

100% chance at 13 luck
The explosion can hurt Isaac

synergies: Abyss: When Isaac uses Abyss to absorb Fire Mind it turns into a burning locust that sets enemies on fire but does not explode.
Bob's Rotten Head: Creates fire when the head lands.
Compound Fracture/Cricket's Body/Haemolacria/The Parasite: Each fractal tear has its own chance to explode. However, if the main tear explodes, all fractal tears explode.
na Death's Touch: Adds burn damage to the scythes, but will not cause explosions.
Dr. Fetus: All Dr. Fetus bombs will leave a flame behind after exploding, similar to the effect of Hot Bombs.
Epic Fetus: The missile will leave behind a fire.
Explosivo: Explosivo tears leave a flame behind after exploding.
Finger!: Finger familiar can set enemies on fire but won't cause explosions.
Host Hat/Pyromaniac: Makes Isaac immune to explosions caused by flaming tears.
Ipecac: Every time the tear explodes, it will leave a fire.
Jacob's Ladder: Sparks can set enemies on fire but won't explode.
Lost Contact: Tears can explode when they destroy an enemy's tear.
Piercing tears: Tears will pierce enemies and retain the chance to self-destruct each time it hits an enemy.
r Tears will pierce enemies without exploding, then self-destruct when they hit a wall or fall to the ground.
r Soy Milk: Explosions are smaller (similar to those of Scatter Bombs) and do not reach Isaac as easily.

r can no longer remove Missing No.}}

synergies: Black Feather: Grants a damage boost.
aCursed Eye: Removes teleportation effect of Cursed Eye.
Cursed Penny: Removes teleportation effect upon picking up a coin.

collectibles.name: Proptosis
desc_lines: ↑ +0.5 Damage
↓ Tears deal less damage the longer they are airborne
Tears deal 3x damage at point blank range and no damage after 0.8 seconds
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Damage}} +0.5 Damage#↓ Tears deal less damage the longer they are airborne#Tears deal 3x damage at point blank range and no damage after 0.8 seconds
synergies: Anti-Gravity: The tears will not decrease in size or damage until they start moving, making this excellent against enemies that chase Isaac.
Anti-Gravity + Eye of the Occult: Lets Isaac maintain the full 3× damage multiplier while controlling his tears.
Anti-Gravity + Spoon Bender: Tears will move towards enemies while maintaining the full 3× damage multiplier, negating both the need to release tears and the power decrease with distance.
Brimstone: Retains the double damage effect without losing damage over range.
a Damage is doubled again for a total of 4x next to Isaac, but quickly drops further along the beam, at about 0.8x per tile of distance, reaching its minimum of 0.1 per tick roughly at 8 tiles.
r The beam does 6x damage at point blank range.
C Section: Fetuses deal triple their usual damage (2.25× Isaac's damage) at point blank, but shrink and deal less damage over time.
C Section + Mom's Knife: The knives shrink along with the fetuses, but they retain their tripled damage.
C Section + Tech X: The rings shrink along with the fetuses, but they retain their tripled damage.
C Section + Technology: Although the laser's damage diminishes along with the fetus, it does not lose its damage over range.
Dr. Fetus/Epic Fetus: nr Doubles damage with no penalty for distance.
r Triples/quadruples damage respectively.
Godhead: The damaging halo shrinks with the tears.

A Lump of Coal: Proptosis scales with Isaac's damage while the Lump of Coal does not. At base damage, the Lump of Coal will approximately negate the damage lost over distance, but with increased damage, tears still do more damage up close.
A Lump of Coal + The Ludovico Technique: The controlled tear has full Proptosis damage buff, nr no matter how far it is from Isaac. r Very slightly decreases damage from far away.
Mom's Knife: The Knife damage is nr doubled (r tripled), regardless of range.
Polyphemus: Tears do massive damage and carry with leftover damage while still shrinking.
Technology/Technology 2: Doubles damage.

a The beam decreases in damage and width the farther it travels. Tears become virtually powerless across large rooms like the Boss Rush and the Hush fight, reaching its minimum of 0.1 roughly at 8 tiles.
r The beams do 6x damage at point blank range.
Tech X: Ring size and damage is substantially increased, but decreases as the ring travels further from Isaac.
Trisagion: Base damage is doubled and beam damage is boosted to about 65%. Blasts lose no power as they travel further, though the tips of the blasts deal very slightly less damage.
r Damage slightly increased, beam damage is doubled. Blasts lose no power with distance.
Bird's Eye: Size and damage of fires is increased, but does not decrease with range.

collectibles.name: Missing Page 2
desc_lines: +1 Black Heart
Taking damage down to 1 heart damages all enemies in the room
Black Hearts and Necronomicon-like effects deal double damage
collectibles.desc_raw: {{BlackHeart}} +1 Black Heart#Taking damage down to 1 heart damages all enemies in the room#{{Collectible35}} Black Hearts and Necronomicon-like effects deal double damage
synergies: Black Feather: Counts as an 'evil' item, granting a damage up.
Blood Rights / Dry Baby / The Negative / Heartbreak / XIII - Death / Black Rune: The damage boost is applied to these items.
A Missing Page/Missing Page 2: The damage increase from the trinket/copies of Missing Page 2 stacks, adding +40 damage per stack to The Necronomicon and similar effects.

synergies: Car Battery: Essentially uses the rune or soul stone twice.

Jera: Allows Isaac to copy pickups with every use. This combination can double Lil' Battery, which can both circumvent the rune's high charge time and allow for game-breaking combos with repeated use of the synergy.

Duct Tape: Picking up Duct Tape while Dry Baby has the same position as Isaac will result in Dry Baby blocking almost all projectiles that would hit him while holding the trinket.
This can be achieved by standing in a doorway, dropping Duct Tape, leaving the room, then re-entering the room slowly.

Spawns 1-2 friendly spiders after clearing a room

collectibles.name: Leech

Heals Isaac for half a heart when it kills an enemy
Deals 3.2 damage per second

synergies: Arcades: The player can let the Leech eat Fly from the Shell Game and use the resulting health to gamble on the Blood Donation Machine.
BFFS!: Leech grows bigger and does double damage. Still only heals for a Half Red Heart.

E. Coli: Enemies can be turned into Poop at the cost of a Half Red Heart, then consumed by the leech to regain health. Utilization of temporary immunity when hit can allow multiple enemies to be turned into poop, resulting in a net gain of health. However, when combined with Gnawed Leaf (see below), the player can simply stand still and let Leech do the dirty work.
Flush!: The leech still can attack the enemies turned into poop and gain health.
Gnawed Leaf: The player can stand still and allow the Leech to clear a room, granting simple clears and easy health.
Tainted Bethany: The leech can grant blood charges by killing enemies.
Tainted Magdalene: Leech restores a full Red Heart.

collectibles.desc_raw: Spawns a random pickup every 5-6 rooms

The explosion can hurt Isaac

r Contact damage becomes 20 and explosion damage increases to 125.

Explodes when it hits an enemy

synergies: Baby-Bender: Brimstone beams will home in on enemies.
BFFS!: The beam deals double damage.

Hemoptysis: Enemies hit by the sneeze will gain a curse that increases the damage the Brimstone beam deals to 8 damage per tick. Enemies who die to the Brimstone beam under the curse will damage and spread the curse to nearby enemies.
Hemoptysis + BFFS!: The curse causes the beam's damage to be increased to 13 damage per tick.
King Baby / Marked: While firing, Brimstone will be charged automatically and fired immediately upon full charge, the beam will now target the nearest enemy/crosshair.

collectibles.name: Isaac's Heart
desc_lines: Isaac becomes invincible
Spawns a heart familiar that follows Isaac
The heart charges up when Isaac fires and releases a burst of tears when he stops
If the heart familiar gets hit, Isaac takes damage
collectibles.desc_raw: Isaac becomes invincible#Spawns a heart familiar that follows Isaac#The heart charges up when Isaac fires and releases a burst of tears when he stops#{{Warning}} If the heart familiar gets hit, Isaac takes damage
synergies: 120 Volt/Monstrance: These items become much safer to use offensively as they are centered around Isaac's body which no longer takes damage.
Blood Rights: Blood Rights doesn't deal damage to Isaac, allowing repeated usage without penalty.
Box of Friends: Box of Friends does not duplicate the heart, making it safe to use.

Breath of Life: Isaac can be infinitely invulnerable, as invincibility carries out to the heart without hurting the player. Note that the item needs to be activated for longer than one second for the invulnerability to kick in, however.
r Works as normal except for the fact that the damage to the heart must be blocked to spawn the 4 beams.
Duct Tape: Makes dodging significantly easier.
E. Coli: Isaac can turn enemies into poop without taking damage.
Holy Mantle: The shield effect carries over to the heart.
Gigante Bean: Makes the heart much easier to defend as it increases the knockback amount and radius of the heart when fully charged and the heart makes farting noises when it shoots.
Items granting invulnerability or a shield: The invincibility carries over to the heart.
r Due to the contact damage, Gnawed Leaf allows Isaac to clear most rooms without moving.
IV Bag: Can be used without taking damage, resulting in an infinite amount of coins.
Kamikaze!: As long as the heart is away from the blast radius, no damage is taken. The character must be at high enough speed for this.
Pyromaniac / Host Hat: Explosion immunity carries over to the heart.
The heart must be in range of explosion for Pyromaniac to heal Isaac.
Razor Blade: Isaac cannot take damage from the Razor Blade, allowing for infinite uses of the item.
Sacrificial Altar: Can remove the Isaac's Heart familiar while the item remains, making Isaac invulnerable.
r Sacrificial Altar now doesn't remove Isaac's Heart.
Serpent's Kiss: Isaac can poison enemies by contact without taking damage, allowing for free black hearts.

desc_lines: Chases and fears enemies

Panic Button: Makes Isaac immune to contact and projectile damage while moving.

Familiars that orbit Isaac (such as Sacrificial Dagger, Sworn Protector, etc.) can damage enemies when Isaac jumps over them. However, items that activate on contact (e. g. Serpent's Kiss, Midas' Touch, etc.) cannot trigger during jumps.

Rerolls Isaac's speed, tears, damage, range and passive items
Rerolls all pedestal items, pickups and rocks in the room
Restarts the room, respawns all enemies and devolves them
collectibles.desc_raw: Duplicates 1 pickup in the room#Rerolls Isaac's speed, tears, damage, range and passive items#Rerolls all pedestal items, pickups and rocks in the room#Restarts the room, respawns all enemies and devolves them

For instance, all Red Flies become Black Flies

collectibles.name: Blank Card
desc_lines: Triggers the effect of the card Isaac holds without using it
collectibles.desc_raw: Triggers the effect of the card Isaac holds without using it
synergies: Butter!: As Blank Card is dropped upon usage, the recharge time for it is reset to 4, allowing to use more expensive cards much more frequently.
Car Battery: Uses the card twice. For example, if used with the Two of Hearts/Diamonds/etc. cards it will quadruple whatever amount Isaac has.
Tarot Cloth: Invokes the extra effect when used.
r Only certain cards gain the Tarot Cloth effect with Blank Card.
Car Battery + Tarot Cloth: The effect of the active card is quadrupled.
r Only certain Tarot Cloth effects will be doubled again.
2 of Diamonds + Restock or in Greed mode

Coins can be infinitely generated by buying Lil' Battery. As Lil' Batteries only cost 5 coins (need two lil' batteries to reload blank), as long as Isaac starts with at least 21, the maximum of 99 coins can be quickly reached.

This cannot be repeated infinitely outside of Greed Mode, as Restock now increases the price of a shop slot each time something is purchased from it. Having 12 coins will very slowly allow Isaac to obtain 99 coins, however.
Deep Pockets allows this to once again be repeated infinitely, as the price will cap at 99 coins, while up to 999 coins can be obtained.
? Card: Teleports Isaac to the I AM ERROR room. This will consume both the Blank Card and the ? Card.

An exception is when they are used on Chest, Dark Room, The Void, Ultra Greed, Mausoleum/Gehenna II leading to Ascent, Corpse II, or Home floors. Using them here consumes both the Blank Card and the ? Card, spawning an I AM ERROR Shopkeeper.
Jera: Copies pickups with every use. This combination can double Lil' Battery, which can allow for game-breaking combos, due to repeated use of the synergy.
Spawning too many items will cause objects to despawn. This can even despawn the End Chest after finishing a final boss fight.

Since The Jar will store any leftover health from healing Red Heart Containers, this can allow for potentially infinite health when healing half-empty containers. Especially effective in conjunction with Cancer or The Wafer.

Instantly kills poop enemies and bosses
Extinguishes fire places and fills the room with water

Dirty Mind: Enemies that are turned into poop generate double the normal amount of Dips.
Midas' Touch: Touching poops made from enemies turns them into Golden Poops just before being destroyed dropping the normal Golden Poop pickups including Counterfeit Penny.
Oh Crap: Isaac can heal by destroying poops created from enemies.

Purchasing these devil deals has the same consequences as those in Devil Rooms
Does not affect item pedestals in The Void floor
collectibles.desc_raw: {{BlackHeart}} +1 Black Heart#{{DevilRoom}} Using the item before a boss fight makes the boss reward a devil deal#Purchasing these devil deals has the same consequences as those in Devil Rooms#Does not affect item pedestals in The Void floor
synergies: Converter: Allows for generation of Heart Containers. (Schoolbag required)
Car Battery: Gives Isaac two black hearts.
Soul of the Lost: The Devil Deal can be taken for free.
r There's Options: 2 Devil Deals will be offered, but only one can be taken.
Coupon: The Devil Deal can be taken for free. Schoolbag is recommended.
Dream Catcher: If the floor boss is revealed to be one of the horsemen, and the player has no interest in the Cube of Meat, or doesn't mind paying health for it, Satanic Bible can be used early.

nr Each beam now deals 44 damage per tick, ticking a total of 20 times, dealing a total of 880 damage per use.
r Each beam now deals 20 damage per tick, ticking a total of 20 times, dealing a total of 400 damage per use.

collectibles.desc_raw: Knocks back nearby enemies and projectiles#Enemies pushed into obstacles take 10 damage

Panic Button: Activates Butter Bean upon taking damage. If the damage was from a projectile that Butter Bean can knock away, it will be negated.

collectibles.name: Magic Fingers

9 Volt + Habit: Allows for an easy setup to get max health as long as one has a self-damage source, such as a Blood Donation Machine or a Devil Beggar.
Guppy's Paw
nr Allows Isaac to have 10 Heart Containers and 1 Soul Heart.
r Allows Isaac to attain up to 12 Red Heart Containers or any combination of Red Heart Containers and Soul Hearts.
Potato Peeler + Sharp Plug: Allows Isaac to generate infinite damage upgrades and Cube of Meat.
r ??? + Birthright: Removes one Soul Heart and grants two, effectively becoming a 3-room charge Book of Revelations.
Tainted Eden: Heart containers gained from Converter are kept, even after rerolling.
r Black Judas / Tainted Judas: Converts one Black Heart into one Black Heart, keeping Judas’ health the same as before but activates The Necronomicon effect regardless.

Invincibility

Orbital Familiars (Cube of Meat, Sacrificial Dagger, etc.): The orbital can be used freely in every single room, making it a great alternative source of damage.

synergies: Berserk!: Because of Berserk giving you +0.4 speed with every kill, Libra would instead steadily increases the damage, tears, and range stat with seemingly no limit, allowing massively high DPS, but targets are much more difficult to hit as the range of the swing gradually extending outwards more and more with each kill.
Soy Milk: As tear delay is valued very highly by the formula, greatly increases all stats.
r Soy Milk is only a minor DPS upgrade, and as such a very minor all stats up.
Ipecac: Can be rapidly fired with decreased damage.

Rock Bottom: Stats will increase as a result of items, get locked at the highest point, and then be balanced out via Libra allowing items like Ipecac and Soy Milk to have higher damage/shot speed respectively.
Taurus: Gradually increases all stats in an incomplete room. Libra prevents Isaac from becoming invincible (unless with high stats), and stat increases will remain until the end of the fight.
Tape Worm: As range is valued very highly by the formula, greatly increases all stats. Synergizes well with Mom's Box.
r Tape Worm is a flat +3 range instead of x2, resulting in only a small all stats up.

r Homing tears: Creep moves towards nearby enemies that are on the ground, ignoring ones that fly.
Ipecac: Creep becomes green and poisons enemies but does not explode.

Epic Fetus: Missiles are not affected by low shot speed and the fire rate difference is negligible, granting double damage with nearly no downside.
Mom's Knife: The Knife is not affected by shot speed. Fire rate reduction down and 2x damage multiplier still apply.
Trisagion: Beams turn black and do double damage. The low shot speed makes beams damage enemies more frequently.
Tech X: Tech X benefits from a lower shot speed due to it staying on enemies longer and is also not affected by range, giving little downsides.
r The fire rate reduction can be a major downside as it takes longer to charge Tech X and shots deal less damage when not fully charged.

synergies: Candy Heart: Doubles the stat boosts from any picked up Heart. Half Red Hearts give two boosts, full Red Hearts give four, and Double Red Hearts give eight.

IV Bag + Old Bandage + Humbleing Bundle / Maggy's Bow: The damage from IV Bag has a chance to spawn 2 hearts, which can be picked up to create further coins and possibly even heal hearts with enough Luck.
r Humbleing Bundle only has a 50% chance to double the hearts dropped, but Old Bandage may still drop 1 heart.
Tainted Bethany: Doubles all blood charges gained from Red Hearts.
The Jar: Allows for generation of infinite Red Hearts.

collectibles.name: Holy Mantle
desc_lines: Negates the first hit taken once per room
collectibles.desc_raw: Negates the first hit taken once per room
synergies: Belly Jelly / Host Hat / Infamy / Metal Plate: The chance of blocking projectiles is applied before the Holy Mantle, allowing the Holy Mantle shield to be saved.
Blanket / Dogma / Holy Card / Wooden Cross: All stack with Holy Mantle. nr+ Holy Mantle applies last.
r+ Shield-type items stack in the following order
Wooden Cross
Blanket
Holy Mantle
Holy Card
Dogma
Blind Rage: Doubles the invincibility frames given when damage is negated.
Damocles: The nullified first hit does not trigger the chance of the sword falling. It will not, however, protect Isaac from the falling sword.
E. Coli / Midas' Touch: On-contact effects still apply to enemies if Holy Mantle negates the contact damage taken.
Isaac's Heart: The shield effect transfers to the heart.
Stop Watch: If damage is blocked with Holy Mantle, Stop Watch will trigger the slow effect.
Tainted Lazarus + Greed Mode: The shield regenerates every wave if broken. This allows one form of Tainted Lazarus to press the button for free on every wave.

desc_lines: ↑ +1 Health
↓ -0.4 Speed

Isaac can destroy rocks by walking into them

collectibles.name: Strange Attractor
desc_lines: Isaac's tears attract enemies, pickups and trinkets
The attraction effect is much stronger at the end of the tears' path
collectibles.desc_raw: Isaac's tears attract enemies, pickups and trinkets#The attraction effect is much stronger at the end of the tears' path
synergies: Brimstone: Enemies and pickups are sucked towards the beam, increasing accuracy significantly.
Dr. Fetus: Enemies are sucked towards bombs, increasing accuracy and making enemies easier to kill.
Explosivo: When the shot sticks to an enemy, every enemy near it will be attracted to them.
Godhead: Enemies will be pulled into Godhead's damaging aura, increasing the aura's effectiveness at causing damage.
Ipecac: Enemies and pickups are pulled towards the shots, increasing accuracy. The color of shots and their explosive effect is a darker green.

The Ludovico Technique: Enemies, items, and even most bosses will be sucked to the single floating tear, dealing constant damage while keeping Isaac well away from harm, making this combination extremely effective in almost all scenarios.
Mom's Knife: Enemies are pulled towards the knife. The effect is minor while not firing and much stronger while the knife is launched.

Nose Goblin/Sinus Infection: Attraction effect will remain on the booger shot stuck to an enemy. This can drag the enemy across the whole room until they reach one wall and get stuck on it, effectively disabling their normal movement.
r Tainted Forgotten: Tainted Forgotten attracts enemies, putting them in range of his bone club attack.
Technology/Technology 2/Tech.5: The beam will attract enemies, often sucking them into the beam and holding them there.
Tech X: Enemies and pickups are attracted to the outer ring, increasing accuracy.
Tractor Beam: The lack of random spread and momentum-based trajectories on tears makes the way enemies are pulled around more predictable.

collectibles.name: Cursed Eye
desc_lines: Charged wave of 5 tears
Taking damage while partially charged teleports Isaac to a random room
collectibles.desc_raw: Charged wave of 5 tears#{{Warning}} Taking damage while partially charged teleports Isaac to a random room
synergies: Black Candle: Teleport effect is removed.
Holy Mantle: Losing Holy Mantle while charging Cursed Eye will not teleport Isaac.
Incubus
nr Incubus fires 3 tears for each one that normally would be fired, with no change in delay.
r Incubus has the same charge shots as most characters would. Getting hit while charging will have the chance to teleport, as usual.

Marked: Tears are charged and automatically fired to varying levels depending on the distance between Isaac and the reticule. The firing rate is greatly increased without affecting the tears stat, even beyond normal maximum fire rate. The teleport effect is removed.
Technology: Becomes a quick charging laser that shoots multiple lasers on release.
Epiphora: Epiphora's tear rate multiplier affects the number of tears in a burst for a total of ten shots with a full Epiphora charge.
Technology 2: Laser fires while charging Cursed Eye. Tear delay for the charge is unaffected by Tech 2. Allows Cain to fire normal tears.
r Tears are replaced with lasers, fired from the same eye of Tech 2. Conjoined transformation removes the synergy.
Mutant Spider / The Inner Eye / 20/20 / The Wiz / Conjoined: Isaac shoots multiple tears from each eye, the amount is item-dependent.
The Lost/Tainted Lost: Since The Lost dies in one hit, it is effectively immune to its teleportation effects, making this item much safer to use.

collectibles.name: Mysterious Liquid
desc_lines: Isaac's tears leave creep
The creep deals 30 damage per second
collectibles.desc_raw: Isaac's tears leave creep#The creep deals 30 damage per second
synergies: Compound Fracture / Cricket's Body / The Parasite: Each split tear leaves a creep, creating lots of creep pools.
Explosivo: Leaves an explosion-sized creep whenever the Explosivo tear goes off.
Flat Stone: Each tear bounce leaves a pool of creep.
The Ludovico Technique: Spawns creep trail under the tear on a constant time interval.
Mom's Knife: Spawns a line of creep behind the knife as it shoots towards enemies, each one left on random time interval.
Spirit Sword: The projectiles from the sword spawn creep pools, sword attacks do not.
Tech.5: The lasers spawn creep pools always when it hits obstacles and occasionally on enemies.
Technology 2: The lasers rapidly spawn creep pools on hitting both obstacles and enemies.
Tech X: The laser rings spawn creep pools when it hits enemies on a constant time interval.
Trisagion: The blasts leave long trails of creep pools, and a creep for each damaging tick. Since the effect stacks, they cause massive damage.

Angelic Prism: While the tear is in contact with the prism, it will fire 4 additional tears in cardinal directions at Isaac's tear rate.
Azazel: The same effect as with Brimstone, but the damage is halved.

Berserk!: The tear can't be controlled while berserking, but it can be batted around the room until the effect ends.
Tainted Samson: uses a passive form of Berserk! that works the same way.
Bookworm: Causes an additional smaller tear to constantly appear and disappear, teleporting from Isaac's location to the main Ludovico tear in a glitchy manner.

Brimstone: Tear takes the shape of a very large laser ring. nr The shot speed is ignored. The Tears stat is ignored and the damage is dealt very rapidly at a rate equivalent to 1 tear delay. This ring will always be present and doesn't need charging up like normal Brimstone would.
Brimstone + Incubus: Incubus' Brimstone laser is not affected by Ludovico Technique.
r Adds a smaller controllable laser ring in addition to the main one.
Brimstone + Twisted Pair: Similar effects to Incubus.
r Brimstone + Ipecac: +2 damage, beam explodes when colliding with enemies and obstacles.
Brimstone + A Lump of Coal: The ring increases in diameter, but not the damage, the farther away it gets from Isaac.
Brimstone + Spoon Bender: The ring reaches out to attack enemies near it, reforming into a ring when no enemies are present.
Brimstone + Technology: The ring is visually identical to a normal Brimstone ring, but the 1.5x damage multiplier applies.
Brimstone + 20/20/The Inner Eye/Mutant Spider / Conjoined: no effect.
Brimstone + Apple! / Holy Light / Other tear effects: no effect.
Compound Fracture: Turns tear into a large bone, which shoots out smaller tears when attacking/touching an enemy. Scattered tears are spectral and piercing.
Dead Eye: Damage bonus increases until it hits the max of 2x. Since the controllable tear never hits the ground or wall, the bonus cannot be lost.
Dr. Fetus: A bomb is shot out at high speed and can be controlled, another bomb cannot be shot until the previously shot bomb has detonated.
r Causes your tears to act like Epic Fetus and now inherits all synergies Epic Fetus has.
Epiphora: Moving the tear in one direction for an extended time increases your fire rate.

Explosivo/Nose Goblin/Sinus Infection: Every tick of damage the Ludovico tear deals has a chance to stick a separate Explosivo/booger tear onto the enemy allowing Isaac to continue controlling the Ludovico tear.
Eye of the Occult: While holding a direction key, the Ludovico tear will constantly shoot out controllable tears in random directions. The air time of these tears scales with the range stat.

collectibles.name: Soy Milk
desc_lines: ↑ x5.5 Fire rate multiplier
↓ x0.2 Damage multiplier
↓ -0.3 Tear size
Drastically reduces knockback
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Tears}} x5.5 Fire rate multiplier#↓ {{Damage}} x0.2 Damage multiplier#↓ {{Tearsize}} -0.3 Tear size#Drastically reduces knockback
synergies: 20/20: The shot pattern may help in controlling enemy knockback, in addition to dealing up to nr double damage r 60% more damage.
Blood Clot: +1 damage bonus on the left eye. Blood Clot tears are unaffected by the damage penalty.
r Brimstone/Azazel: Beam can be fired continuously after charging. The beam can change its direction while being fired, and can be aimed in any direction with joystick controls.
Chemical Peel: +2 damage bonus on the left eye. Chemical Peel tears are unaffected by the damage penalty.
Chocolate Milk: Shots cannot be charged, but Isaac gains a flat +1 damage up after the Soy Milk penalty.
r Shots cannot be charged, but Isaac shoots moderately charged shots at a quick pace.
Cursed Eye: Fires automatically upon reaching full charge. This may be riskier than Cursed Eye alone because Soy Milk prevents Isaac from holding a fully charged shot.
Euthanasia/Little Horn: Allow Isaac to quickly execute non-boss enemies.
r Little Horn's damage to bosses is not affected by the penalty, resulting in significantly higher damage output.

Explosivo: Despite the tiny appearance of the bomb tears, the explosions will do normal explosion damage. Due to the massive fire rate, many bombs can be applied in extremely quick succession, decimating anything after a short delay.
Godhead: The damage of the tears' aura is not affected by the reduction.
Head of the Keeper: The barrage of tears makes it much more likely for coin drops.
Ipecac: The very fast rate of fire fills the screen with low damage explosions.

Ipecac + Technology: The lasers will explode when they hit a rock, wall, or enemy. This combined with Soy Milk's fire rate and Ipecac's damage makes for an extremely safe method of clearing most rooms.
Lead Pencil: The extra tear burst is fired very often.

Libra: Decreases fire rate slightly, but massively increases damage, range, and speed. Tear height is also massively increased, meaning tears can hit enemies through obstacles without spectral effect.
r Resets stats to slightly higher than base level.
r Libra + Brimstone: Constant Brimstone beam at normal/higher damage.
Lost Contact: Extremely effective at blocking shots.
A Lump of Coal: Significantly increases tear damage as they get further away.
Monstro's Lung: Continuously fires tear barrages without the need to be charged.
The Mulligan: Will generate an enormous wave of blue flies given that each tear has a 1/6 chance of spawning one.
The same applies to Guppy since each tear nr is guaranteed to spawn a fly r has a 2/3 chance of spawning one.
Mysterious Liquid: Each shot creates creep that deals reasonable damage but stacks with every shot, causing hefty damage.
Piercing tears: Causes tears to affect enemy movement less for better accuracy, though also removes the advantage of rapidly knocking back enemies.

collectibles.name: Godhead
desc_lines: ↑ +0.5 Damage
↓ -0.3 Tears
↓ -0.3 Shot speed
Homing tears
Tears gain an aura that deals 60 damage per second
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Damage}} +0.5 Damage#↓ {{Tears}} -0.3 Tears#↓ {{Shotspeed}} -0.3 Shot speed#Homing tears#Tears gain an aura that deals 60 damage per second
collectibles.unlock: Earn all 12 Completion Marks on Hard mode as The Lost
synergies: Bob's Rotten Head: Creates a Godhead aura around the head and applies homing effect when thrown.
Compound Fracture/Cricket's Body/The Parasite: Main tears and burst tears retain all effects.
Explosivo/Mucormycosis: Causes damaging aura to grow once attached to an enemy.
Euthanasia: The aura of a needle tear will also do triple damage, but does not cause tear burst or instant kill.
Glass Cannon: The huge tear gains the homing ability and a much larger, more powerful damaging aura.
Lachryphagy: Fired tears and burst tears retain aura and homing effect.
Piercing tears: When a tear bursts, the 8 smaller tears' auras can stack, doing massive damage to enemies within.
The Ludovico Technique: Tear increases in size and gains the damaging aura effect.
r Tear also gains homing effect. May cause the tear to get stuck near enemies.
A Lump of Coal: The size and damage of the aura increases as long as the tear is on screen.
r Only the size of the aura increases.
Pulse Worm: The aura increases and decreases in size.
Saturnus: The orbiting tears also have the damaging aura, but without the homing effect.

collectibles.name: Lazarus' Rags
desc_lines: When dead, revive as Lazarus (Risen)
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Player11}} When dead, revive as Lazarus (Risen)
synergies: Tainted Lazarus / Dead Tainted Lazarus: Revived as Tainted Lazarus / Dead Tainted Lazarus correspondingly instead of Lazarus Risen.

collectibles.name: The Mind
desc_lines: Full mapping effect
collectibles.desc_raw: Full mapping effect
synergies: r Book of Secrets: Immediately gives the X-Ray Vision effect for the floor upon use.

collectibles.name: The Body
desc_lines: ↑ +3 Health
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Heart}} +3 Health

Grants an aura that repels enemies and projectiles

desc_lines: ↑ +0.22 Tear size

Piercing + spectral tears

synergies: Incubus: Does not affect shot speed or tear size, but still gives the piercing effect.
r: Shot speed, range, and tear size will be affected.
Lost Contact: Tears will destroy enemy projectiles without being destroyed in the process.

collectibles.name: Broken Watch
desc_lines: Slows down every 4th room
13% chance to speed up the room instead
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Slow}} Slows down every 4th room#13% chance to speed up the room instead

Petrifies enemies and deals 2x Isaac's damage
Can grab and bring back items

collectibles.name: Diplopia
desc_lines: Duplicates all item pedestals and pickups in the room
collectibles.desc_raw: Duplicates all item pedestals and pickups in the room
synergies: Most passive item stats bonuses stack normally when duplicated.
Active item copies do not share charges, and appear with a full charge (unless the item normally spawns empty of charges).
20/20: Isaac fires 3 tightly-packed tears with no increase in tear delay.
r Damage down does not stack.
Additional copies of Book of Virtues do not have any effect.
Brimstone: Isaac fires two lasers simultaneously.
r Isaac gains a powered-up version of Brimstone with a unique costume that deals 1.2x damage and has +1 damage. Further copies will add another +1 damage.
Contract From Below: Triples the drops upon clearing a room.
Damocles: Spawns an extra item for each item cloned.
Dr. Fetus: Isaac fires two bombs simultaneously.
Eden's Blessing: Tears upgrades stack and Isaac gains two items at the start of the next run. Stacks up to nr+ 10 / r+ 2 times.
Epic Fetus: Two missiles drop, one after the other.
The Inner Eye: Isaac fires 6 tears. Tears down stat does not stack.
r Isaac fires an additional tear. Tears down stat does not stack.
The Ludovico Technique: A smaller tear orbits the main tear.
Maw Of The Void: Increased damage for tears and ring.
Mom's Knife: Isaac fires two knives simultaneously.
Monstro's Lung: The tear burst gains another nr10 tears/r12 tears, nearly doubling in size. Stacks up to 4 times.
Mutant Spider: Isaac fires 8 tears. Tears down stat does not stack.
r Isaac fires 2 additional tears. Tear down stat does not stack.
The Relic: An extra soul heart is given for each relic familiar.
Schoolbag + any active item: While there is no use in duplicating the Schoolbag, it gives Isaac a use for duplicating an active item.
Steam Sale: All items in Shops become free. With Restock, items can be infinitely bought for free.
r Each additional Steam Sale will further halve the price. Items cannot be reduced below 1 cent.
Technology: Isaac fires two lasers simultaneously.

collectibles.name: Placebo
desc_lines: Triggers the effect of the pill Isaac holds without using it
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Pill}} Triggers the effect of the pill Isaac holds without using it
synergies: 48 Hour Energy
nr Can spawn an unlimited number of Lil' Battery, allowing unlimited use of another activated item or pill.
r One battery is guaranteed to be a Lil' Battery, any additional batteries spawn as Micro Battery. The item does not recharge upon use.
Placebo + Car Battery: Both batteries are guaranteed to be Lil' Battery, any additional batteries spawn as Micro Battery, once again allowing unlimited usage.

IX - The Hermit? can be used to "sell" any and all Lil' Battery and Micro Battery for 5 Pennies each, effectively allowing for in instant max of coins, provided you have spawned The Hermit? in another room, or have it in your second slot with Polydactyly.
+ Schoolbag + Blank Card: Effectively an extremely complicated method of producing infinite money.
nr Balls of Steel + Sharp Plug: Allows functional invincibility.
nr The Wafer: Allows for virtually infinite health.
r Vurp: Allows pills that normally take 12 rooms for Placebo to charge to be used twice as frequently.

collectibles.name: Wooden Nickel
desc_lines: 59% chance to spawn a random coin
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Coin}} 59% chance to spawn a random coin
collectibles.unlock: Donate 30 Coins to the Greed Donation Machine
synergies: 9 Volt: Allows for infinite generation of coins in a room with enemies.
Car Battery: Two independent attempts of generating a coin, which can be of different values.

collectibles.name: Toxic Shock
desc_lines: Entering a room poisons all enemies
Enemies killed leave a puddle of creep
The creep deals 30 damage per second
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Poison}} Entering a room poisons all enemies#Enemies killed leave a puddle of creep#The creep deals 30 damage per second
synergies: Second Hand: Extends the poison duration, allowing it to tick 6 times on normal enemies and 4 times on bosses.

collectibles.name: Mega Bean
desc_lines: Deals 100 damage and petrifies all enemies in the room
Deals 5 damage and poisons any enemies nearby
Can open secret rooms and break rocks
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Petrify}} Deals 100 damage and petrifies all enemies in the room#{{Poison}} Deals 5 damage and poisons any enemies nearby#Can open secret rooms and break rocks
synergies: Bird's Eye/Ghost Pepper: Whenever Mega Bean is used, a fire will be shot out behind Isaac. Two flames will be shot if Isaac also has Car Battery.
Car Battery: Deals double damage, but the status effect lasts for the same amount of time.

collectibles.name: Glass Cannon
desc_lines: Shoots a large piercing spectral tear that does 10x Isaac's damage
While held, taking damage:
↓ Removes an extra 2 hearts of health
↓ Breaks the cannon for a few rooms
↑ +1.5 Range and leaves a blood trail for the room
The extra damage can't kill Isaac
Self-damage does not trigger the effect
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Damage}} Shoots a large piercing spectral tear that does 10x Isaac's damage#{{Warning}} While held, taking damage:#↓ Removes an extra 2 hearts of health#↓ Breaks the cannon for a few rooms#↑ {{Range}} +1.5 Range and leaves a blood trail for the room#The extra damage can't kill Isaac#Self-damage does not trigger the effect
collectibles.unlock: Beat The Family Man (challenge #19) and defeat Lokii
synergies: Chocolate Milk: The current charge of Chocolate Milk affects Glass Cannon.
Compound Fracture / Cricket's Body / The Parasite: Tears fired by Glass Cannon will split.
Godhead: Creates a giant aura around Glass Cannon tears that almost fills up normal sized rooms.

Lachryphagy: Glass Cannon will fire giant Lachryphagy tears. Tears are harder to feed as they will burst very quickly but they can be fed if you fire tears beforehand and then fire Glass Cannon into those tears.
Multidimensional Baby: The Glass Cannon tears will be doubled by Multidimensional Baby.
Mysterious Liquid: Creates a large pool of creep when tears land.
Tiny Planet: Tears produced by Glass Cannon will orbit Isaac.
Lost Contact: The Glass Cannon tears can block enemy shots.

collectibles.name: Bomber Boy
desc_lines: +5 Bombs
Bombs explode in a cross-shaped pattern
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Bomb}} +5 Bombs#Bombs explode in a cross-shaped pattern
synergies: BBF/Best Friend/Bob's Brain/a+nrRed Locusts: Explosion damage is halved with no additional explosions.
BBF/Best Friend/Bob's Brain/Mr. Boom/rRed Locusts: Bomber Boy affects the item’s explosion.
Red Locusts will create additional smaller explosions that spawn in a tight cross formation.
Pyromaniac: Heals Isaac multiple times per bomb depending on the number of explosions that hit him.
Dr. Fetus: Bomber Boy affects the bombs fired by Dr. Fetus.

Doctor's Remote/Epic Fetus: Bomber Boy affects the missiles' explosions from Epic Fetus, with the explosions' multiplier resulting in 15 times Isaac's damage per explosion. Unlike with regular bombs, Bomber Boy won't decrease the damage from each of the missile's successive explosions, drastically increasing damage.
Hot Bombs: Each extra explosion creates an additional fire.

Mr. Mega: All explosions deal more damage, have a larger radius and will overlap each other more, potentially vastly increasing damage. Caution should be exercised, as the explosions' increased radius make self-damage likely.

collectibles.name: Crack Jacks
desc_lines: ↑ +1 Health
Heals 1 heart
Spawns a trinket
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Heart}} +1 Health#{{HealingRed}} Heals 1 heart#{{Trinket}} Spawns a trinket

desc_lines: ↑ +2.5 Range
↑ +1 Luck
+1 Soul Heart
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Range}} +2.5 Range#↑ {{Luck}} +1 Luck#{{SoulHeart}} +1 Soul Heart

collectibles.name: Car Battery
desc_lines: Using an active item triggers its effect twice
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Battery}} Using an active item triggers its effect twice
synergies: Best Friend: Spawns two decoys on top of each other.
Blank Card: Uses the card twice. For example, if used with the Two of Hearts/Diamonds/etc. cards it will quadruple whatever amount Isaac has.
Blank Card + Tarot Cloth: The effect of the active card is quadrupled.

Broken Shovel 1: Prevents the Mom's Foot from appearing for two rooms (empty or not), or for two waves of a Challenge Room or the Boss Rush, essentially removing the stomping attacks for the entire duration of the Boss Rush.
D10: Weakens affected enemies twice.
Isaac's Tears: The damage of tears shot from the active item is doubled.
Kamikaze!: Now causes smaller explosions in a ring around Isaac.
Jacob's Ladder / 120 Volt: Electricity deals 75% of Isaac's tear damage if he owns 1 of these items, to 100% if Isaac owns both.

Crooked Penny: Splits the 50% chance to succeed into a 25% chance to quadruple all items and a 25% chance to duplicate all items while consuming the originals; the latter will make Devil deal and Shop items free.
r The 25% chance to duplicate all items while consuming the originals now generates 2 pennies instead.
Sulfur: Will count as giving double Brimstone, giving extra damage and a x1.2 damage multiplier for the current room.
Void: Applies Car Battery's effect on all eligible absorbed active items. Absorbing passives will not give extra stat ups.

collectibles.name: Box of Friends
desc_lines: Duplicates all your familiars for the room
Grants a Demon Baby for the room if Isaac has no familiars
collectibles.desc_raw: {{Timer}} Duplicates all your familiars for the room#{{Collectible113}} Grants a Demon Baby for the room if Isaac has no familiars
synergies: Ball of Bandages / Cube of Meat / Potato Peeler: Upgrades the cube/ball for the current room. This can be used to easily unlock the Super Meat Boy and Bandage Girl achievements.
r Cubes of Meat from Potato Peeler cannot be duplicated or upgraded.
Blood Puppy: Tames an angry Blood Puppy and spawns another temporary one.
Bob's Brain: When used upon entering a room, Box of Friends eliminates the item delay, which allows Isaac to launch Bob's Brain immediately.
Car Battery: Adds two copies of each familiar.
Charged Baby: All around useful, can charge box of friends mid room to spawn more of itself creating a charging loop.
Daddy Longlegs: Familiar will be copied.
Incubus: Creates additional Incubus familiars, which share the same tear modifiers as the player.
Lil Dumpy: Will copy Lil Dumpy, effectively adding an extra charge to Lil Dumpy's Holy Mantle-like protection.
This process can be repeated to make Isaac near-invincible.
Smart Fly: Very useful on Greed mode, as using it will add an attacking fly, killing enemies and bosses very quickly.
Twisted Pair: Creates additional Twisted Pairs with the same tear modifiers as the player. Multiple twisted pairs will line up horizontally, covering a broader area.

collectibles.name: The Wiz
desc_lines: Spectral tears
Isaac shoots 2 tears at once diagonally
collectibles.desc_raw: Spectral tears#Isaac shoots 2 tears at once diagonally
synergies: 20/20 / Conjoined: Fires 2 tears in both diagonal directions.
nr Diplopia/Crooked Penny: Each additional copy of The Wiz will make Isaac fire two more tears in a wider diagonal layout.
r Each additional copy of The Wiz will make Isaac fire one extra tear, starting with one tear fired forwards.
Eye of the Occult: Both tears shoot much closer together and can be controlled, creating for a better double shot similar to what Tractor Beam would grant.
The Inner Eye/Keeper: Fires 2 tears to both diagonal directions with a wider spread.
Mutant Spider /Tainted Keeper: Fires 3 tears to both diagonal directions.
Spirit Sword: Beams and sword swings are fired forwards instead of diagonally. Isaac spins an additional time when doing a charged attack.
Technology Zero: Electricity arcs between both tears, damaging enemies between them.
Tractor Beam: Both tears will follow the beam, making it easier to hit enemies with them.
Tractor Beam + Mom's Knife: Knives ignore the path of the beam and remain flying diagonally.
Tiny Planet: Each shot fires two tears in opposing orbital directions. The orbit can be controlled as normal.

collectibles.name: 8 Inch Nails
desc_lines: ↑ +1.5 Damage
Increases knockback
collectibles.desc_raw: ↑ {{Damage}} +1.5 Damage#Increases knockback
synergies: Dr. Fetus / Epic Fetus / Ipecac: Explosions also gain increased knockback.
Piercing tears: Allows tears to knock enemies back again.

Brimstone / Tech.5 / Technology / Technology 2 / Tech X / Mom's Knife / Trisagion: They gain knockback. Especially powerful with Tech X, as the knockback helps keeps enemies within the ring for longer.

collectibles.name: Incubus
desc_lines: Shoots tears with the same effects as Isaac
Deals 75% of Isaac's damage
collectibles.desc_raw: Shoots tears with the same effects as Isaac#{{Damage}} Deals 75% of Isaac's damage
synergies: nr Azazel / Brimstone: Fires a full-length Brimstone laser that can be charged while still firing the previous laser, allowing it to fire more rapidly than normal.
The laser fired by Incubus has the same width as Lil Brimstone's.
r When playing as Azazel, Incubus' Brimstone laser has the same range as him.
r Multiple copies of Brimstone will not grant Incubus the mega brimstone effect.
Berserk! / The Forgotten / Spirit Sword: Incubus will carry the respective melee weapon, using it exactly like Isaac.
BFFS!: Shoots tears that do 2x)}} Isaac's damage.
Cursed Eye: A burst of 3 tears is fired at the regular tear delay without needing to charge.
r Incubus now charges and fires a burst of up to 5 tears just as Isaac would.
Forgotten Lullaby: Doubles the fire rate of Incubus. This notably makes it fire and charge-attack faster than Isaac does.
Immaculate Heart: Incubus can create its own orbiting tears, which will orbit the Incubus that created it, and not Isaac.
Technology 2: Incubus can fire the Technology 2 laser too.
Tractor Beam: The Incubus tears will follow the beam. This makes it seem as if the tears come directly from Isaac, even if blindfolded.
anrTractor Beam + Monstro's Lung: Also allows the Incubus tears to follow the beam.

collectibles.name: Fate's Reward
desc_lines: Shoots tears with the same damage and effects as Isaac
Shoots at half the rate of other familiars
collectibles.desc_raw: Shoots tears with the same damage and effects as Isaac#Shoots at half the rate of other familiars
synergies: Flat Stone: Familiar's tears will travel very far and then bounce once, traveling up and hitting the nearest wall.
Haemolacria: Will fire tears that burst into split tears. Does not affect fire rate.
Ipecac: Will fire explosive tears. Does not affect fire rate.
Lachryphagy + Brimstone: The tears fired by the familiar will eventually explode in a star-like pattern of Brimstone lasers if they don't hit anything.

collectibles.name: Lil Chest
desc_lines: 35% chance to spawn a pickup every room
collectibles.desc_raw: 35% chance to spawn a pickup every room
synergies: BFFS!: The chance to spawn a pickup increases to 31.25%, and the chance to spawn a trinket increases to 12.5%.
