synergies: Golden Trinket / Mom's Box: Places 1 extra bomb per copy.
Blasting Cap: The extra bomb also has a chance to drop a bomb pickup.
Nancy Bombs: Grants a random bomb effect to each bomb separately.
Rocket in a Jar: Fires two rockets simultaneously.

trinkets.name: Nuh Uh!
desc_lines: On Womb and beyond, replaces all coin and key spawns with a bomb, heart, pill, card, trinket, battery, or enemy fly
trinkets.desc_raw: On Womb and beyond, replaces all coin and key spawns with a bomb, heart, pill, card, trinket, battery, or enemy fly
trinkets.unlock: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as Tainted Eden
synergies: Golden Trinket / Mom's Box: Each copy grants +10% chance to spawn the double variant of pickups.
Head of the Keeper: Coins generated by Head of the Keeper will be replaced with random pickups.
Sanguine Bond: 17% of the time, generates ~5 random pickups, often allowing infinite use with red hearts.
The Sacrifice Room will pay out with ~26 random pickups on it's 10th use 50% of the time.
Midas' Touch / Eye of Greed: Enemies affected by Midas' touch will drop 1-4 random pickups.
Because 20% of coins become harmless Fly, 20% of the time you can trigger this effect again by affecting and killing spawned flies.
Wooden Nickel: Can generate a random pickup ~40% of the time.
4.5 Volt: Generate random pickups over the course of a fight.
Blank Card: Allows repeated use of card effects that synergize with this trinket.
IX - The Hermit?: Pickups / Items are sold and turned into other random pickups.
XIV - Temperance: The generated machine now drops random pickups.
Ace of Diamonds / Ace of Spades: Re-rolls pickups in the room into other random pickups or turns enemies into random pickups.
XII - The Hanged Man?: Slain enemies drop random pickups.
A Card Against Humanity: Coins dropped by generated poops become random pickups.
Midas' Touch / Petrified Poop: Greatly increases the amount of coins and thus the amount of random pickups.
Soul of the Keeper: Creates 0-25 random pickups.
IV Bag / Piggy Bank / Swallowed Penny: Convert health into random pickups.
Gimpy / Old Bandage / Fanny Pack: Further increase the chance of hearts appearing after use allowing the generation of even more random pickups.
Tainted Keeper: Coins generated by killing enemies will be replaced by random pickups, however they will still disappear after a short time.
Lucky Rock: 26.6% of rocks exploded will drop random pickups.

Guppy's Tail: The keys needed to open gold chests will be converted to other pickups. However, the large quantities of coins generated from chests can be turned into many random pickups. Dropping Nuh Uh! at the start of the floor and then picking it back up to collect random pickups later allows for keys to collected but still gain large quantities of random pickups. Due to the large amount of pills and bombs generated, having the Bombs are Key pill effect in the pool may allow you to turn a surplus of bombs into a surplus of keys as needed.

Chaos: Removes the item pool constraint for Modeling Clay's available items.
Rock Bottom: Permanently increases Isaac's stats when it transforms into an item that surpasses Isaac's current stats.
Sacred Orb: Temporary items are affected by Sacred Orb.
Sacrificial Altar: If Modeling Clay is currently mimicking a viable familiar, it will also be sacrificed and spawn an additional Devil Room item, but Modeling Clay will not be destroyed.

Friendship Necklace + Spin to Win: Familiars affected by Friendship Necklace are still considered orbitals regardless of positioning allowing Isaac to use their contact damage without getting close to enemies. RC Remote also prevents familiars that weren't already orbitals from flashing when Spin to Win is used despite still being affected by the active item.
King Baby: Familiars are not held in place while firing but still auto-target enemies.
Lilith: Incubus can be positioned on top of Lilith, effectively removing Lilith's downside.

Tainted Forgotten: Familiars will move with Tainted Soul, and not follow behind Tainted Forgotten like they normally do. This is massively beneficial as it allows Tainted Soul to have actual protection against enemies. Orbitals still remain orbiting Tainted Forgotten as expected.

characters.unlock: Kill floor-1 boss <1 min -> Boss Rush for Mom's Shovel -> dig the Dark Room grave

characters.name: Bethany
characters.health: 3 red hearts, 4 soul charges (=2 soul hearts)
characters.gimmick: Soul/black hearts convert to soul charges that fuel her active item; Book of Virtues spawns wisps.
characters.unlock: Beat Mom's Heart/It Lives on Hard as Lazarus without dying

characters.name: Jacob and Esau
characters.gimmick: Control two bodies at once (shared coins/bombs/keys, separate items/stats/HP); either dying ends the run.
characters.unlock: Defeat Mother with any character

characters.name: Tainted Isaac
characters.gimmick: Holds only 8 passive items; a 9th drops the highlighted one. As payback, most pedestals/shop/devil items show 2 choices.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Magdalene
characters.gimmick: Health above 2 hearts drains (~1/2 heart / 10s, leaves creep); her auto melee swing (6x dmg) makes kills drop half-hearts; double healing from non-heart sources.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Cain
characters.gimmick: Craft items from 8 pickups via the Bag of Crafting recipe system; no random item luck — you build what you gather.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Judas
characters.gimmick: Dark Arts: brief invulnerability + "kill-charge" burst; melee/aggressive glass-cannon play.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted ??? (Blue Baby)
characters.gimmick: Weaponizes colored poops he defecates; -0.35 tears; manages poop piles as bombs/shields/attacks.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Eve
characters.gimmick: Lowest base fire rate; hold-fire spawns blood clot familiars (each costs 1/2 heart) that vary by heart type; Sumptorium reclaims clots as health.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Samson
characters.gimmick: Berserk! meter: dealing/taking damage builds rage; at threshold (~120 base dmg, +40/floor) he gains speed/fire rate/+3 dmg but is locked to a jawbone melee for ~5s (+1s per kill).
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Azazel
characters.gimmick: Fires a thin room-long Brimstone (0.5x/tick); a short Hemoptysis "sneeze" curses enemies so they take full +3 damage and halves beam charge.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Lazarus
characters.gimmick: Two separate characters (own items/stats, like J&E); Flip swaps between Living and Dead Lazarus, and he auto-swaps on room clear. Birthright makes the inactive form a ghost that fires alongside.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Eden
characters.starting_items: Random (0-2 bomb, 0-1 key, 0-5 coin, 0-1 trinket/pill/card, random active+passive)
characters.gimmick: Everything rerolls whenever he takes non-self damage — stats, items, trinket, held card/pill all reshuffle (a few quest/story items are exempt).
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Lost
characters.gimmick: Spectral flight, 1.3x damage, no Holy Mantle / Eternal D6; only offensive items appear naturally (defensive ones get rerolled); ~10% of cards become Holy Cards (invuln shields).
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Lilith
characters.gimmick: Blindfolded; launches a demon baby Gello on an umbilical cord — it deals 3x contact damage and fires 1x tears while held, then recalls.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Keeper
characters.gimmick: Enemies drop vanishing coins that heal him; most items must be purchased with coins (including devil/angel/boss/treasure); hearts still become blue flies.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Apollyon
characters.gimmick: Abyss destroys room items and turns them into charging locust familiars (special items = special locusts); can consume an active mid-pickup into a locust.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Forgotten
characters.gimmick: Tainted Forgotten = invulnerable skeleton that can't move; Tainted Soul = the hitbox that carries & throws him (thrown swing deals 3x); shared soul-heart pool.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Bethany
characters.gimmick: Cannot use red hearts (they become blood charges, 1 per 1/2 heart, that power actives); Lemegeton wisps have a 25% chance to pull from the current room's pool.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

characters.name: Tainted Jacob
characters.gimmick: Hunted all game by hostile Dark Esau (contact "kills" Jacob -> becomes a Lost-like ghost with no Holy Mantle until next floor); Anima Sola chains Dark Esau in place for 5s.
characters.unlock: Reach Home, use a Red/Cracked Key or Soul of Cain on the base character to open the Tainted closet

bosses.name: Monstro
bosses.description: Hops toward you (contact damage), spits a wide fan of blood shots, and does a big jump that lands on your position. The tutorial boss.

bosses.name: Larry Jr.
bosses.description: A segmented worm that slithers around the room chasing you; damage it until the whole body dies. Contact damage only; posthumous **The Hollow** in Ch2.

bosses.name: The Duke of Flies
bosses.description: Slowly floats toward you spawning Attack Flies; pops open to release swarms of flies. Keep the fly count down and shoot the body.

bosses.name: Gemini
bosses.description: Two conjoined bodies — a large stationary "Contusion" and a fast tethered "Suture" that charges you. Killing the small one enrages the big one.

bosses.name: Steven
bosses.description: Gemini palette-variant: same two-body fight, fires a steady stream of blood shots from the large head.

bosses.name: Gurglings / Turdling doubles
bosses.description: Two small bodies that hop around firing shots and charging; always spawn as a pair.

bosses.name: Widow
bosses.description: A spider boss that hops around leaving creep and spawning Sacks/spiderlings; posthumous form is **The Wretched** in Ch2.

bosses.name: Pin
bosses.description: Burrows underground and lunges up through your position, firing shots on emergence. Later variants: **Scolex** and **The Frail**.

bosses.name: Famine
bosses.description: Horseman of Famine — charges across the room and spits shots; splits into a crawling head at low HP. One of the Four Horsemen minibosses.

bosses.name: Dingle / Dangle
bosses.description: A pile of poop that charges in cardinal directions and fires spreads of blood shots. **Dangle (AB+)** is the hanging variant that drops in.

bosses.name: The Haunt
bosses.description: Starts shielded behind 1-3 Lil Haunt ghosts you must kill first; then floats toward you firing a sweeping projectile line.

bosses.name: Little Horn
bosses.description: Teleports around throwing Troll Bombs and firing "The Bony" black shots; a dark hand appears where he'll strike.

bosses.name: Rag Man
bosses.description: Spawns Raglings from its body, sends them charging, and revives them until the main body dies. Posthumous form **Rag Mega** in Ch2.

bosses.name: Turdlings
bosses.description: A double pile-boss pair that hop and fire spreads while leaving creep.

bosses.name: Baby Plum
bosses.description: Bounces off walls spitting diagonal streams, twirls out spiral shots, and ground-slams a ring of projectiles while leaving red creep.

bosses.name: Blighted Ovum
bosses.description: A ghost-and-fetus pair; the fetus fires spectral shots while the ghost body shields it, releasing spiders on death.

bosses.name: The Rainmaker
bosses.description: Fires horizontal and circular projectile spreads, drops large water shots that burst into random directions, and twirls after you ending in a radial burst.

bosses.name: Min-Min
bosses.description: Floats slowly at you spawning up to 4 (then 7) orbiting Willo lights that fire shots and chase you; two-phase fight.

bosses.name: Wormwood
bosses.description: Lunges out of water pits firing cardinal shots, zig-zag chases you, and at low HP does a tail-pierce that opens new pits and spawns adds.

bosses.name: Clog
bosses.description: Spits a Drip minion, lays three spreading lines of gas/farts, fires 4 spiraling projectile lines, and swirls the water around himself.

bosses.name: Colostomia
bosses.description: Hops in place then slides at you in the nearest cardinal direction firing shots, leaving explosive gas trails and lobbing bombs that chain-ignite the gas.

bosses.name: Turdlet
bosses.description: Loosely chases you bouncing off walls, then after ~7s huddles and launches tail-first, spinning at high speed across the room before stopping.

bosses.name: Lil Blub
bosses.description: A fish boss that swims/hops around the room firing shots and diving between water tiles.

bosses.name: Chub
bosses.description: A three-segment worm that charges you and can swallow you (spitting you out for damage). Feed it a bomb to kill it fast. Variants **C.H.A.D.** and **Carrion Queen**.

bosses.name: C.H.A.D.
bosses.description: Chub variant: stationary, fires red shots and lobbing hearts; same swallow gimmick.

bosses.name: Carrion Queen
bosses.description: Chub variant: spins around the room leaving creep and firing shots in a spiral.

bosses.name: Gurdy
bosses.description: A huge stationary boss embedded in the wall that spawns flies/Chargers and fires bursts of blood shots in fans.

bosses.name: Gurdy Jr.
bosses.description: Small bouncing Gurdy that ricochets around the room firing shots as it moves; contact damage.

bosses.name: Mega Fatty
bosses.description: Fatty variant: charges, does a ground-slam shockwave, and vomits waves of shots.

bosses.name: Mega Maw
bosses.description: Wall-mounted mouth that fires waves of shots and lobs bombs/embers; you can only dodge, not reposition behind it.

bosses.name: Fistula
bosses.description: A bouncing ball of flesh that splits into smaller and smaller pieces each time you damage it, all doing contact damage. Variant **Teratoma**.

bosses.name: Peep
bosses.description: Fires from two floating eyes; drops its eyes as roaming hazards and pees creep across the floor.

bosses.name: The Husk
bosses.description: Duke of Flies variant that spawns Ragling/host adds and bursts into fly swarms.

bosses.name: The Hollow
bosses.description: Larry Jr. posthumous variant — a segmented worm that fires shots from each segment as it slithers.

bosses.name: The Wretched
bosses.description: Widow posthumous variant: hops around leaving creep, spawning spiders and Sacks, and firing spreads.

bosses.name: The Stain
bosses.description: A large fleshy boss anchored by fleshy tethers/tumors; fires shots and reels adds in.

bosses.name: The Frail
bosses.description: Pin variant: burrows and lunges, second phase is a spinning skull that fires Brimstone-style bursts.

bosses.name: The Forsaken
bosses.description: A skeletal ghost that phases around firing bone shots and swinging a spectral scythe; leaves a bony body when moving.

bosses.name: Polycephalus
bosses.description: A many-headed poop boss embedded in the floor; heads pop up to spit shots and it burrows to relocate.

bosses.name: Dark One
bosses.description: Fires fast Brimstone-like beams and spawns Kamikaze Leeches; aggressive ranged pressure.

bosses.name: Bumbino
bosses.description: Slowly pursues you, does single and double claw swipes into ground-slam shot rings, charges when aligned, and lobs bombs.

bosses.name: Big Horn
bosses.description: A giant hand-and-face in a pit — the hand slams and drags across the arena, throws Troll Bombs, and fires shots; face appears to attack.

bosses.name: Rag Mega
bosses.description: Rag Man posthumous: spawns and revives Raglings in bigger waves, firing homing black shots.

bosses.name: Reap Creep
bosses.description: Three phases climbing the wall: Wall Creep spawns wall adds and shoots; Blind Creep fires scattered shots and spiders; Rage Creep slams walls and unleashes Brimstone lasers.

bosses.name: Tuff Twins
bosses.description: A rock-armored Larry Jr.-style pair; bomb off the armor, then heads spit Suckers and body segments spew Boil-like shots. Posthumous form **The Shell**.

bosses.name: The Shell
bosses.description: Posthumous version of Tuff Twins — the exposed twin worm continues firing shots after the armor is gone.

bosses.name: Hornfel
bosses.description: Rides a minecart around the room; throws 1-2 (Brimstone/Troll) bombs, accelerates while bombing then vomits fireballs, and drops decoy dummies that burst into Troll Bombs.

bosses.name: Great Gideon
bosses.description: No health bar — survive **6 waves** of enemies while Gideon does a room-wide vacuum, cone projectiles, flame attacks, and rock waves that chew up the arena.

bosses.name: The Pile
bosses.description: Burrows and emerges firing bone-shot spreads, summons up to 2 Bonies, sends spikes from the walls, and charges with rock waves + bone shots on impact.

bosses.name: Singe
bosses.description: Spawns with 4 damaging Singe's Balls; farts explosive gas, charges with explosions, and at HP thresholds does big jumps that create pits plus fire streams.

bosses.name: Clutch
bosses.description: Phase 1 possesses one of three Clickety Clacks (head spins, shoots 8 bone shots, fires chained bone volleys); Phase 2 rushes you firing volleys of purple flames.

bosses.name: Monstro II
bosses.description: Bigger Monstro: teleport-hops onto your position, fires a large shot spread, and spawns Suckers; leaps that shake shots loose from the ceiling.

bosses.name: Gish
bosses.description: Monstro II variant: black tar theme — leaves slowing black creep, lobs sticky shots, and does the same jump-slam.

bosses.name: The Cage
bosses.description: A fast, aggressive brute that charges across the room and fires quick shot spreads; high contact damage.

bosses.name: The Gate
bosses.description: Wall-mounted face that fires waves of shots and pulls a large hand/adds from the wall; positional dodge fight like Mega Maw.

bosses.name: The Bloat
bosses.description: Peep variant: hangs from the ceiling firing Brimstone lasers left/right and dropping its two eyes as hazards while peeing creep.

bosses.name: Loki / Lokii
bosses.description: Fires cross-shaped Brimstone bursts in the four cardinal (then diagonal) directions; **Lokii** is the two-body version that doubles the pattern.

bosses.name: The Adversary
bosses.description: Charges around the room leaving creep and firing dense blood-shot spreads; a fast pressure fight.

bosses.name: Mask of Infamy
bosses.description: A mask-and-heart pair — the mask charges and is invulnerable until you damage the exposed heart behind it.

bosses.name: Brownie
bosses.description: A poop boss that spawns Dip minions and Brownie Corns, fires shot rings, and leaves creep; adds pile up fast.

bosses.name: Daddy Long Legs
bosses.description: Teleports and stomps giant legs onto your position (telegraphed shadows), fires shot spreads, and rains shots from above. Variant **Triachnid**.

bosses.name: Triachnid
bosses.description: Daddy Long Legs variant with more legs and denser stomp/rain patterns.

bosses.name: Sisters Vis
bosses.floors: Depths / Necropolis / Dank Depths (& Womb, Void)
bosses.description: A twin-eyeball pair that rolls around leaving colored creep firing Mega Blast lasers; they leap to opposite sides for colliding beams and enrage when one is hurt.

bosses.name: The Siren
bosses.description: Charms up to 3 of your familiars against you, summons her own minions, sinks into the floor leaving damaging creep, and does AoE scream rings. Kill charmed familiars or reclaim them.

bosses.name: The Heretic
bosses.description: Lobs 7 fire-bursting projectiles, launches at you into a radial burst of 8 fire lines, lights fireplaces to fire Brimstone lasers, and does invisible charge attacks.

bosses.name: The Visage
bosses.description: Three phases: a chained mask charges while the heart wanders; the chain breaks and the mask chases while the heart uses chain attacks; final phase the heart fires slow energy shots and projectile rings.

bosses.name: The Horny Boys
bosses.description: A cycling multi-attack fight — summons adds with shots, juggles and throws effect-bombs, fires escalating tear patterns, and teleports while lobbing Brimstone Bombs.

bosses.name: Mama Gurdy
bosses.description: Wall-spanning Gurdy across the top of the room — fires downward shot waves, sweeps a laser tongue, and spawns adds; dodge along the bottom.

bosses.name: Mr. Fred
bosses.description: Breaks one of 4 chained Homunculi, fires cardinal blood shots that leave creep, burrows and shoots in all directions, and spawns burrowing Freds. Big, tanky.

bosses.name: The Matriarch
bosses.description: Hops spawning Fistulas/Fistuloids, launches Chubbers in all directions, spews a long-range blood shot leaving red creep; later transforms into a Chub form spawning glowing Fistuloids.

bosses.name: Teratoma
bosses.description: Fistula variant — a bouncing flesh ball that splits into ever-smaller contact-damage pieces.

bosses.name: Blastocyst
bosses.description: A bouncing sac that splits into progressively smaller globs (Embryos) on each hit, all doing contact damage and leaving creep.

bosses.name: Scolex
bosses.description: Pin variant — a long worm that burrows and lunges across the screen; only its glowing tail segment is vulnerable.

bosses.name: Daddy Long Legs / Triachnid
bosses.description: Telegraphed leg stomps, shot spreads, and rain-from-above.

bosses.name: The Scourge
bosses.description: Floats fast trying to get above you; fires a large fast cluster shot that bursts into shots + creep, drags wall tendrils, and does a suction attack pulling shots inward in spirals.

bosses.name: Rotgut
bosses.description: Three phases: stationary head firing shot patterns; a large maggot that attacks based on your position; a heart that cycles two shot modes while spawning adds.

bosses.name: The Four Horsemen — Famine, Pestilence, War, Death
bosses.description: Each charges and fires; splits into a crawling head at low HP. Scaled to their chapter.

bosses.name: The Fallen
bosses.description: Splits into two smaller Fallen that fire Brimstone bursts.

bosses.name: Headless Horseman
bosses.description: A flying head and body — the head circles firing shots while the body charges; kill the head.

bosses.name: Gurglings / Turdlings
bosses.description: Always-double small bosses that hop, charge, and fire spreads.
